---
description: Post-ship retrospective capturing learnings for compounding. Report-only; does not write memory or edit doctrine without approval.
alwaysApply: false
---

# `/sw-retro`

Lightweight retro after a shipped phase.

Load `skills/retro/SKILL.md`. Produce learning candidates for `/sw-retrospective` (compound write step).

**Communication intensity:** lite

**Model tier:** mid — resolve via `python3 scripts/resolve-model-tier.sh --command sw-retro`.

## Guardrails

- No doctrine/memory writes without explicit user direction.
- Redact before any optional persistence.
